description: Fixture schema for AutoJoin web-benchmark pairs.

fields.pair_id: string; directory name of the benchmark pair

source.key_columns: array<string>; columns used as join keys in source

target.key_columns: array<string>; columns used as join keys in target

ground_truth.file: string; relative path to ground truth.csv
ground_truth.source_key_columns: array<string>; columns in ground truth that represent source keys
ground_truth.target_key_columns: array<string>; columns in ground truth that represent target keys
